since_last: 49% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.45%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -2.38% · Gold +0.76% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 49% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.45%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.45%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -14.22%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +2.94%, KLAC +2.77%, LRCX +2.76%, MU +2.68%, LEU +2.53%. Laggards: IBM -14.22%, BIDU -4.11%, NOW -3.71%, WDAY -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.28% at $138.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
